goal: Persist structured-family previewed values once using the proven pilot write shape, without the restore step.

familiesWithProductionSave.hl.animation: global record only (modify-existing/replace-or-append of its own line): renders `animation = global, ONOFF, SPEED, BEZIER` from the validated value plus current runtime fields
familiesWithProductionSave.hl.curve: default record only: renders `bezier = default, X0, Y0, X1, Y1`

scopeEnforcement: the target enum can only express the two proven records; no deletion exists; only the target record's own line is replaced or appended - every other line is preserved (guard-tested)
saveFlow: validate value range before any gate or file access
verify the family has a passed live-proof receipt
verify Safe Live Save Mode live (autoreload disabled at runtime) - fails closed
verify the discovered config is the active real config (identity gate)
byte-exact backup outside the config directory, verified readable
one atomic write of the updated family records
reread and verify exactly one matching record with the exact rendered line
on success: no restore (this is the save); on verification failure: automatic restore from backup

liveFlowProof.gateProof: save correctly blocked while autoreload was active, with the enable-first message
liveFlowProof.animation: wrote `animation = global, 1, 8, default` to the real hyprland.conf; backup created; reread-verified; production code did not restore
liveFlowProof.curve: wrote `bezier = default, 0, 0.75, 0.15, 1`; backup created; reread-verified; production code did not restore
liveFlowProof.flowProofCleanup: the test (not production code) restored the pre-test bytes exactly (SHA verified) and restored the original autoreload state - the config ends byte-identical

ui: Save previewed value button on both family preview controls, routed through gated_family_save_live; blocked reason shown when the mode is inactive
testsAdded: gated_family_save_flow_proof (ignored, env-gated; run once: passed for both targets)
nextRecommendedWork: extend the target set one proven record shape at a time (record picker)

proven: Safe Live Save Mode card with Inactive state and the 'autoreload is active' blocked reason plus Enable/Disable controls (Config runs)
structured-family 'Save previewed value' buttons with the requires-Safe-Live-Save-Mode copy
dead-man countdown and blocked-reason surfaces unchanged
aggregate safety flags all false: realConfigEdited, realBackupsCreated, runtimeMutated, hyprlandReloaded, mutatingHyprctlUsed
